commands.repair_reason: Protected maintainer labeling plus a compatibility-sensitive fallback change make this a human maintainer approval item, not a ClawSweeper repair task.; Cleared: The diff narrows an existing local native-hook generation grace path and adds tests; I found no new dependency, secret, CI, or supply-chain concern. commands.review_summary:
The PR pins the first legacy native-hook relay generation accepted during the grace window and rejects later different stale generations, with generic relay and Codex resumed-thread regression coverage.

PR surface: Source +9, Tests +30. Total +39 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. from source inspection: current main's grace helper only checks the expiry timestamp, so two different stale generations can pass during the grace window. I did not execute tests because this review was constrained to read-only inspection.
commands.review_followup: Protected maintainer labeling plus a compatibility-sensitive fallback change make this a human maintainer approval item, not a ClawSweeper repair task.

target.title: fix(codex): narrow legacy hook generation grace
target.body:
## Summary
- Follow-up to #87272 after the native hook relay restart fix was merged.
- Narrows the legacy bootstrap generation grace so the first observed stale generation is pinned during the grace window.
- Adds regression coverage that a different mismatched generation is still rejected in both the generic relay and Codex resumed-thread path.

## Verification
- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs src/agents/harness/native-hook-relay.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.native-hook-relay.test.ts --run`
- `./node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/harness/native-hook-relay.ts src/agents/harness/native-hook-relay.test.ts extensions/codex/src/app-server/run-attempt.native-hook-relay.test.ts`

Refs #87272
target.author: romneyda
